languages.text: "Ваша Светлость! Радость-то, радость какая! Тридцать лет хромал, а теперь, глядите, прыгаю!.."

traits.locale_text: "Ваша Светлость! Радость-то, радость какая! Тридцать лет хромал, а теперь, глядите, прыгаю!.."

languages.text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! It's wonderful, just wonderful! I've been limping these thirty years, and now, look, I'm jumping!"
languages.original_text: "Ваша Светлость! Радость-то, радость какая! Тридцать лет хромал, а теперь, глядите, прыгаю!.."

traits.locale_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! It's wonderful, just wonderful! I've been limping these thirty years, and now, look, I'm jumping!"
"Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! It's wonderful, just wonderful! I've been limping these thirty years, and now, look, I'm jumping!"
"Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! It's wonderful, just wonderful! I've been limping these thirty years, and now, look, I'm jumping!"

languages.text: 「お方様！素晴らしい、本当に素晴らしい！三十年間、歩けなかったのに、今、見てください、跳べるんです！」
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! It's wonderful, just wonderful! I've been limping these thirty years, and now, look, I'm jumping!"

languages.text: "{mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri! Bu harika, tek kelimeyle harika! Otuz yıldır topallıyordum, artık zıplıyorum!"
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! It's wonderful, just wonderful! I've been limping these thirty years, and now, look, I'm jumping!"

traits.locale_text: "{mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri! Bu harika, tek kelimeyle harika! Otuz yıldır topallıyordum, artık zıplıyorum!"

languages.text: “大人！神了，真是太神了！三十年来，我一直一瘸一拐的，可您瞧——我现在都能蹦起来了！”
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! It's wonderful, just wonderful! I've been limping these thirty years, and now, look, I'm jumping!"

traits.locale_text: “大人！神了，真是太神了！三十年来，我一直一瘸一拐的，可您瞧——我现在都能蹦起来了！”

languages.text: "Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}! Das ist wunderbar, einfach wunderbar! Dreißig Jahre lang bin ich gehumpelt und jetzt seht mich an ... jetzt springe ich!"
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! It's wonderful, just wonderful! I've been limping these thirty years, and now, look, I'm jumping!"

traits.locale_text: "Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}! Das ist wunderbar, einfach wunderbar! Dreißig Jahre lang bin ich gehumpelt und jetzt seht mich an ... jetzt springe ich!"

languages.text: « Votre Seigneurie ! C'est merveilleux ! Tout bonnement merveilleux ! Voilà trente ans que je boitais, et maintenant, regardez-moi ! Je saute ! »
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! It's wonderful, just wonderful! I've been limping these thirty years, and now, look, I'm jumping!"

traits.locale_text: « Votre Seigneurie ! C'est merveilleux ! Tout bonnement merveilleux ! Voilà trente ans que je boitais, et maintenant, regardez-moi ! Je saute ! »

languages.text: «¡Mi{mf|lord|lady}! ¡Es maravilloso, fantástico! Llevo treinta años de cojera, ¡y ahora mire! ¡Estoy saltando!».
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! It's wonderful, just wonderful! I've been limping these thirty years, and now, look, I'm jumping!"
